title: Medicare Program: Ensuring Safety through Domestic Security with Made in America Personal Protective Equipment and Essential Medicine Procurement by Medicare Participating Hospitals

comments_clusters.representative_excerpt: This comment provides a detailed evaluation of the analytical basis for the proposed rule concerning domestic procurement of personal protective equipment (PPE) and essential medicines by Medicare-participating hospitals.
